meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no testing knowledge (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no testing knowledge. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Claude Code Testing Skills Setup Checklist
content.seo_description: Master automated testing as a student. Use this intermediate checklist to integrate Claude Code and Antigravity into your workflow for bulletproof apps.
content.answer_block: Eliminate the 'it works on my machine' syndrome by embedding automated testing into your development lifecycle. By pairing Claude Code’s iterative refactoring with Antigravity’s test-generation capabilities, you transform testing from a manual burden into a continuous, automated safety net that guarantees your code is production-ready.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks architecting your first SaaS project, but every time you push a feature, the foundation cracks. The fear of breaking existing functionality is paralyzing, and your lack of formal testing knowledge has turned your repository into a house of cards. You are building in the dark, hoping your code holds under pressure.

It is time to change your trajectory. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you stop guessing and start engineering. This workflow isn't just about catching bugs—it's about building the confidence to ship faster, iterate bolder, and graduate from a student coder to a professional AI builder.

steps.title: Environment Baseline & Context
steps.description: Initialize your project context so Claude Code understands your architecture before suggesting tests.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project structure and identify the most critical business logic functions that require unit test coverage.

steps.title: Automated Test Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Antigravity to define the test architecture, ensuring your test suite matches your production stack.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Jest test scaffold for the identified modules, focusing on edge cases and boundary conditions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'generate unit tests for src/services'

steps.title: TDD Implementation Loop
steps.description: Adopt a Test-Driven Development flow where Claude writes the test first, then the implementation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a failing test case for the new user authentication endpoint based on these requirements.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'implement the function to satisfy the failing tests in authentication.test.ts'

steps.title: Regression Shielding
steps.description: Automate regression testing to ensure new features don't break legacy components.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a regression test suite that validates core data flow across all controllers.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'ensure all existing tests pass after refactoring'

steps.title: CI/CD Integration
steps.description: Seal your workflow by triggering Claude Code to verify all tests before every commit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a GitHub Actions workflow that runs the test suite and flags failures before deployment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'generate a .github/workflows/test.yml file for my project'

pro_tips: Always use the 'Explain' flag in Claude Code to understand why a specific test assertion was chosen.
Treat your test suite as documentation; if a test is hard to read, your code is too complex.
Use Antigravity to simulate 'chaos' by injecting random input values into your functions to test robustness.
Configure Claude Code to ignore node_modules and build artifacts to keep context windows focused on your logic.
Commit your tests in the same PR as your features to maintain a clean, verifiable history.
content.next_steps: Integrate your new test suite into a live deployment pipeline using Vercel or Railway, and monitor your test coverage metrics over the next two weeks.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the professional-grade testing workflow used by top-tier engineers to ship high-stakes software. Stop fearing your own codebase and start building with absolute certainty. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
